completed_tasks.name: edit-glow CSS vars + textspan-editor placeholder utility
Editor leaf components + tests (7 components, 26 tests)

remaining_tasks.name: ModuleCard.tsx integration (React.lazy, click-outside, Esc, dirty-nav guard, view-mode BlockListRenderer); ≥8 new tests; existing F8 tests must keep passing
ModuleCard.roundtrip.test.tsx — end-to-end test covering all 9 CONTEXT acceptance criteria with MSW
Phase gates: regression, code review, schema drift, codebase drift, verify_phase_goal, ROADMAP/STATE update

decisions.rationale: Plan claimed they were pre-installed but only @dnd-kit/core@6.3.1 was vendored; companions match the dnd-kit 10/utilities 3 line that pairs with core 6.3.x

decisions.decision: Toolbar Bold ↔ active TextSpanEditor cross-wiring deferred to plan 01-06 polish
decisions.rationale: BlockEditorProps signature ({block, onChange}) doesn't expose onReady/onBoldStateChange — extending the registry contract was out of scope for plan 01-05. Ctrl+B inside the contentEditable still works end-to-end.

decisions.decision: SaveIndicator's auto-fade effect uses an eslint-disable for react-hooks/set-state-in-effect
decisions.rationale: Plan 01-05 task 5.3 explicitly required internal setTimeout-driven fade; the trigger is an external prop (status), not derived state. Comment in source documents this.

next_action: Begin plan 01-06 task 6.3: read src/App.tsx + src/routes/ to confirm createBrowserRouter (already verified — data router is in use); then create src/features/notebooks/hooks/useDirtyNavBlocker.ts using react-router's useBlocker hook + src/features/notebooks/components/UnsavedChangesDialog.tsx wrapping shadcn AlertDialog. Tests use MemoryRouter wrapper.
context_notes: Wave 2 of Phase 1 is fully complete (plan 01-05 shipped). Wave 3 (plan 01-06) is mid-flight: tasks 6.1 + 6.2 done. Task 6.3 is medium-risk (touches react-router data-router via useBlocker; need MemoryRouter test wrapper). Task 6.4 is the highest-risk step — modifies existing 267-line ModuleCard.tsx with 230 lines of F8 regression tests that must NOT break. Task 6.5 is a single comprehensive round-trip test mocking MSW PUT /modules/:id. Phase 1 is 5/6 plans complete; finishing 01-06 closes Phase 1. Pre-existing pnpm run build TS errors in profile/styling/notebook-layout test files predate Phase 1 and are documented in plan 01-01 SUMMARY — leave them alone.

anti_patterns.description: STATE.md was 2 plans behind reality at session start (claimed 3/6 done while git/SUMMARY artifacts proved 4/6 + 01-05 mid-flight). User had to ask 'sync state first' before resuming.
anti_patterns.mitigation: Update STATE.md as part of every plan completion (do not defer to phase-end).

anti_patterns.description: Plan 01-05 task 5.4 stated @dnd-kit/sortable was 'already in node_modules; no new dep' — only @dnd-kit/core was vendored. Forced an unplanned pnpm add mid-execution.
anti_patterns.mitigation: Plan-checker should run a quick `pnpm ls <claimed-pkg>` smoke test for any 'no new dep' claim during plan_check.
